message:
Add unit tests for SelectionReason and API selection scenarios

- Add serialization/deserialization tests for SelectionReason
- Add Display trait tests for user-friendly reason messages
- Add SelectionResponse roundtrip tests
- Add API tests for no-workers, all-unreachable, all-busy, and success scenarios

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
